column12: According to the contributor, 30 is derived from 60 via loss of <ŋ> from the multiplier <ŋda> 3.
According to the contributor, 50 is derived from 100 via loss of <wa> from the multiplier <muwa> 5.
According to the contributor, the derivation of 70 involves loss of <ŋ> from <ʃìŋ> 7.
According to the contributor, the derivation of 90 involves loss of <du> from <duɡu> 9.
